---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature for ZYRAXON-AI
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like.

## Motivation

Why is this feature important? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you'd like this feature to work.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Mockups/Screenshots

If applicable, add mockups or screenshots to help explain the feature.

## ZYRAXON Integration

- **Agent Mode Integration:** Which agent modes should support this feature? [e.g., All, Build, Beast, PRO, APEX PREDATOR, DARK EMPEROR]
- **MCP Tool Integration:** Should this be an MCP tool? If yes, which category? [e.g., System Intelligence, Web Intelligence, Data Processing, Security Intelligence, AI Enhancement, Productivity Power, ULTRA Tools]
- **YouTube Streaming:** Does this feature relate to YouTube/streaming functionality?
- **Memory System:** Does this feature interact with zyraxon.db or auto-injection?
- **Self-Healing:** Should this feature have self-healing capabilities?
- **Cross-Platform:** Is this feature cross-platform compatible?

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the feature request here.
